chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.10 of 2025 Abdul Razzaq Versus Shakeel Ahmed & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 105/25 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 16.09.2025 Mr. Ali Asghar Buriro, advocate for appellant. Mr. Muneer Ahmed, advocate for respondents No.1 and 2. Mr. Abdul Razzak, advocate for respondents No.3 to 5. -.-.- By consent the impugned order dated 09.08.2024, dismissing the application for restoration of the suit, is set aside and the suit is restored to its original position subject to cost of Rs.250,000/- (Rupees Two Hundred Fifty Thousand only) to be paid by the appellant to the respondents. It is reported that the suit is fixed for final arguments. On the next date the plaintiff/appellant shall appear before the trial Court and submit his arguments without fail. In any case the trial Court shall decide the suit within three months’ time. If the plaintiff/appellant does not appear despite the clear directions the suit shall be decided in terms of Section 17 of the C.P.C. Instant High Court Appeal stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. Judge Judge
